---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or enhancement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What are you trying to do, and what's missing/blocking today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Component(s) affected** (filter node / control plane / UI / Kea / packaging):

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or other approaches you've thought about.

**Design doc reference**
If this maps to a section of [`docs/design.md`](../../docs/design.md) or
[`docs/sprint-plan.md`](../../docs/sprint-plan.md), link it.
